Concept Fan
Co-evolution of the problem and solution!

--- Page 7 ---
Business Example
Problem: People are not coming on time to office. When asked people talk about traffic 
issues, long commutes, work taking them to different parts of town etc. etc.
What are the ideas here? Mark people absent, put a fine, change the timing etc etc.
Now go back to basics. Why should people come on time? You get the concepts: people 
can coordinate better with each other at work if everyone is there at the same time., People 
spend the required amount of time at work. Now what is the main concept that you would 
like to focus on - say it is 'People can co-ordinate better' Now do people have to always 
be coordinating their work, do people have to be present at the same location for 
coordination?
Now based on this analysis one could come to a conclusion that perhaps every day the 
team needs to touch base at least once for coordination and updates, preferably the team 
needs to work from the same space and spend a lot of time together so that softer issues 
can be better handled and facilitate smother communications. So the idea from this could 
be 1) flexible office hours but with fixed time in a day when everyone needs to be present 
either physically or over conference call, and have the main base of work for everyone in 
the same office space, so that people interact and meet each other often to smoothen 
communications.
